CustomField.description: Set the log level for which a Slack notification will be sent in response to a Log Event. Whenever a Log Event is created and the level of the event is encompassed by the currently set Slack Log Level, a message is posted to the configured Slack channel. Requires a Named Credential named RFLIB_SLACK_WEBHOOK to be configured with the Slack Incoming Webhook URL. INFO and below are never sent to Slack regardless of this setting; WARN is the enforced minimum.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set the log level for which Slack notifications are sent in response to a Log Event. Valid values are NONE, WARN, ERROR, and FATAL. WARN is the minimum enforced level — INFO, DEBUG, and TRACE events are never sent to Slack. Requires a Named Credential named RFLIB_SLACK_WEBHOOK.
CustomField.label: Slack Log Level
